The robot plan is:
00:19. Goal: Close laptop.
00:22. Goal: Pick up laptop.
00:48. Goal: Put laptop in garbage can.
01:01. Goal: Pick up remote control.
01:13. Goal: Toggle on television.
01:18. Goal: Put remote control on tv stand.

response: The plan put the laptop in the garbage can instead of on the TV stand, so the final state could not satisfy “a closed laptop is on the TV stand.” Turning on the television was correct, but the laptop placement step was wrong.
